API Reference

Arbiter HTTP API`GET /v1/a2a/agents/:id/agent-card.json``POST /v1/a2a/agents/:id``GET /.well-known/agent-card.json``GET /v1/admin/audit``POST /v1/admin/tenants``GET /v1/admin/tenants/:id``GET /v1/admin/tenants``PATCH /v1/admin/tenants/:id``POST /v1/agents/:id/chat``POST /v1/agents``DELETE /v1/agents/:id``GET /v1/agents/:id``GET /v1/agents``PATCH /v1/agents/:id``POST /v1/conversations/:id/artifacts``DELETE /v1/conversations/:id/artifacts/:aid``GET /v1/conversations/:id/artifacts/:aid``GET /v1/conversations/:id/artifacts``GET /v1/conversations/:id/artifacts/:aid/raw``DELETE /v1/artifacts/:aid``GET /v1/artifacts/:aid``GET /v1/artifacts``GET /v1/artifacts/:aid/raw``POST /v1/conversations``DELETE /v1/conversations/:id``GET /v1/conversations/:id``GET /v1/conversations``GET /v1/conversations/:id/messages``POST /v1/conversations/:id/messages``PATCH /v1/conversations/:id``POST /v1/events``GET /v1/health``POST /v1/lessons``DELETE /v1/lessons/:id``GET /v1/lessons/:id``GET /v1/lessons``PATCH /v1/lessons/:id``POST /v1/memory/entries``DELETE /v1/memory/entries/:id``GET /v1/memory/entries/:id``POST /v1/memory/entries/:id/invalidate``GET /v1/memory/entries``PATCH /v1/memory/entries/:id``GET /v1/memory/:agent_id``GET /v1/memory/graph``GET /v1/memory``POST /v1/memory/relations``DELETE /v1/memory/relations/:id``GET /v1/memory/relations``GET /v1/metrics``GET /v1/models``GET /v1/notifications/stream``POST /v1/orchestrate``POST /v1/requests/:id/cancel``GET /v1/requests/:id/events``GET /v1/requests/:id``GET /v1/requests``GET /v1/runs/:id``GET /v1/runs``POST /v1/schedules``DELETE /v1/schedules/:id``GET /v1/schedules/:id``GET /v1/schedules``PATCH /v1/schedules/:id``GET /v1/schedules/:id/runs``POST /v1/todos``DELETE /v1/todos/:id``GET /v1/todos/:id``GET /v1/todos``PATCH /v1/todos/:id`

Philosophy

Philosophy
API Reference / `GET /v1/notifications/stream`

GET /v1/notifications/stream

Auth: tenant — _Status:_ stable

Long-lived Server-Sent Events stream pushing notification events as scheduled task runs reach terminal state. Scoped to the calling tenant — a leaked subscription only sees that tenant's events.

This is the push counterpart to GET /v1/runs?since=<epoch>. Front-ends typically open the stream once on session start, render events as they arrive, and fall back to the runs endpoint with the last seen started_at if the connection drops.

Request

curl -N \
     -H "Authorization: Bearer atr_…" \
     http://arbiter.example.com/v1/notifications/stream

Response

Content-Type: text/event-stream. The stream opens with a hello frame and emits one notification block per terminal run. A : heartbeat comment every 30 seconds keeps reverse-proxy idle timeouts from killing the connection.

event: open
data: {"ok":true}

event: notification
data: {"kind":"run.started","task_id":17,"run_id":42,"agent_id":"reviewer",
       "status":"running","started_at":1746720000,"completed_at":0}

event: notification
data: {"kind":"run.completed","task_id":17,"run_id":42,"agent_id":"reviewer",
       "status":"succeeded","started_at":1746720000,"completed_at":1746720185,
       "result_summary":"Reviewed deploy 2f8e91. All green."}

: heartbeat

event: notification
data: {"kind":"run.failed","task_id":18,"run_id":43,"agent_id":"research",
       "status":"failed","started_at":1746720500,"completed_at":1746720601,
       "error_message":"upstream rate limit"}

Event kinds

kindWhen
run.startedScheduler has created the run row and is about to invoke the agent.
run.completedAgent returned successfully. result_summary carries the final reply (truncated at 4 KiB).
run.failedAgent threw, the orchestrator init failed, or the target agent is missing. error_message carries detail.

Reconnection

The bus does not buffer events for offline subscribers. After a disconnect, replay missed events with:

curl -H "Authorization: Bearer atr_…" \
     "http://arbiter.example.com/v1/runs?since=<last_seen_started_at>"

Failure modes

StatusWhen
401Missing / invalid bearer.
405Wrong HTTP method (only GET is supported).
503Notifications subsystem not initialized — only happens if the server is mid-shutdown.

See also

  • GET /v1/runs — durable replay surface.
  • Scheduler concept
Previous`GET /v1/models` Next`POST /v1/orchestrate`
Arbiter is experimental open-source infrastructure. Philosophy
